destinations.evidence: The port and its Alloy dependency use ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID for AsyncSettlement, and that constant is 0x12. Envelope tags, storage codecs, receipts, revm/alloy-evm handling, and payload builder gas accounting consistently use 0x12 rather than 0x7.

equivalence_argument: Mapped after correcting stale 0x7 wording: AsyncSettlement is represented as the dedicated AsyncSettlement variants and round-trips through the current AsyncSettlement transaction type id, ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID = 0x12.

related_but_insufficient_code: The original audit entry expected 0x7, but current downstream and dependency code consistently define ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID as 0x12.
ritual-reth-internal-v2.2.0-port storage codecs preserve AsyncSettlement fields through ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID.
ritual-revm-internal and ritual-alloy-evm-internal recognize AsyncSettlement as a system transaction through ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID/0x12.

notes: Mapped after catalog/audit correction: 0x7 was stale or mis-extracted; current AsyncSettlement type id is ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID = 0x12.
rationale: The primary diff adds the AsyncSettlement enum variants and conversions throughout transaction primitives, typed-envelope handling, compact codecs, TxType identifiers, and pool mock conversion, with a dedicated compact codec that maps every settlement field into and out of storage. The audited current code uses ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID = 0x12; the 0x7 wording is not supported by downstream or the port.
statement: A signed TxAsyncSettlement must be represented as Transaction::AsyncSettlement / TxEnvelope::AsyncSettlement / PooledTransaction::AsyncSettlement, report TxType::AsyncSettlement with ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID (currently 0x12), and preserve all settlement-specific fields across 2718 decoding, compact storage encoding, compact storage decoding, envelope conversion, and transaction-pool conversion.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build a TxAsyncSettlement containing distinct values for gas, gas_price, to, value, async_tx_hash, user_address, total_amount, executor/validator addresses and fees, settlement_block, and input; sign it, encode/decode it as a 2718 transaction, compact-encode/decode it through storage codecs, convert through TransactionSigned, TxEnvelope, and PooledTransaction, and assert the type remains AsyncSettlement/ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID and every field is unchanged.
summary: AsyncSettlement round-trip support is mapped with the current type id 0x12.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build and sign a TxAsyncSettlement, 2718 encode it, and assert the first type byte equals ASYNC_SETTLEMENT_TX_TYPE_ID.
title: AsyncSettlement transactions round-trip as type 0x12
